title: Crew Recruitment
description: Expedition crews consist of men of ill repute: prisoners earning freedom, gamblers fleeing debt collectors, and desperate fortune seekers. Kings provide grants worth many times a man's salary to fund expeditions. Crew members have varied backgrounds affecting their skills, reliability, and motivations.
definition-of-done: Crew recruitment system with varied character backgrounds. Background affects stats, skills, and reliability. Royal grants provide funding mechanism.
testing-plan: Verify crew generation produces varied backgrounds. Test that backgrounds affect gameplay stats. Verify grant funding mechanics work correctly.
unknowns: How crew reliability manifests in gameplay
